app.name: Sanadat
app.description: Saudi platform to digitize receipt vouchers, payment vouchers, and non-tax invoices for small businesses.

hero.badge: Trusted Saudi platform for small businesses
hero.subtitle: A trusted Saudi platform to digitize vouchers and non-tax invoices — simple, secure, and ready for future Ministry of Commerce compliance. Annual plan SAR 399.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything your business needs
features.subtitle: A simple, powerful system focused on the documents small businesses use every day

types.title: Three document types
types.description: Receipt vouchers, payment vouchers, and non-tax invoices — all in one platform with official design.

numbering.title: Secure sequential numbering
numbering.description: Unique document numbers that are never reused. Documents cannot be edited after creation.

legal.title: Legal reliability
legal.description: Government-ready print layout with signature, stamp areas, and QR placeholder for future compliance.

export.title: PDF export & print
export.description: Professional A4 documents with RTL/LTR support, print, and WhatsApp sharing.

responsive.title: Fully responsive
responsive.description: Works smoothly on mobile and desktop — built for the Saudi market.

scale.title: Ready to scale
scale.description: Architecture ready for payment gateways and Ministry of Commerce integrations.

1.title: Create your account
1.description: Register your business in minutes and complete your company profile with logo and official details.

2.title: Subscribe yearly
2.description: Pay SAR 399 via Saudi payment methods (Mada, Visa, Apple Pay, STC Pay).

3.title: Issue documents
3.description: Create receipt/payment vouchers and invoices with automatic numbering and official layout.

4.title: Share & print
4.description: Export PDF, print, or share via WhatsApp — with a full activity log.

showcase.label: Document preview
showcase.title: Official print-ready documents
showcase.subtitle: Professional A4 layout — suitable for printing and official archiving

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: One plan — simple & transparent
pricing.subtitle: No complexity — all features included
pricing.gateways: Supported via Moyasar · HyperPay · STC Pay

1.name: Ahmed Al-Shammari
1.text: Saved us hours of paperwork. Documents look very official and clients trust them.

2.name: Fatima Al-Otaibi
2.text: Best voucher system I've used. Simple, fast, and sequential numbering gives peace of mind.

3.name: Khalid Al-Qahtani
3.text: Invoices linked to receipt vouchers — exactly what we need as contractors.

edit.q: Can I edit a document after creation?
edit.a: No. Documents are immutable after creation for reliability. You can only cancel with a reason; cancelled docs remain visible.

cancel.q: What happens when I cancel a document?
cancel.a: It is marked as cancelled and stays in the log with its original number. Numbers are never reused.

tax.a: Designed for non-tax invoices and receipt/payment vouchers. ZATCA tax invoice support is planned for the future.

subscription.a: SAR 399/year with optional auto-renewal. Notifications 7, 3, and 1 days before expiry.

payments.a: Ready for Moyasar, HyperPay, and STC Pay, with Mada, Visa, and Apple Pay.

cta.title: Start digitizing your vouchers today
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of Saudi businesses that trust Sanadat for their financial documents

footer.about: Sanadat — a trusted Saudi platform to digitize receipt vouchers, payment vouchers, and non-tax invoices. Ready for future Ministry of Commerce compliance.
